svg.title: Data Connectors
svg.desc: Data Connectors: registry matrix, 11 rows by 4 columns. ?data= <provider>:<id>.<metric>. Columns: SOURCE, IDENTIFIER, METRICS, KIND. Full data in hw:payload.

hw:reasoning.hw:intent: On paper substrates the same 900-wide matrix lifts off the page via the two-layer primer drop shadow inside a 14px-radius hairline card, the cobalt scan and footer seam carrying the variant accent.
hw:reasoning.hw:approach: Identical solved geometry to dark — one substrate-invariant content stencil; light variants supply the panel gradient, border tint and shadow color through genome DNA. Ink-derived hairlines render as ink-primary at 2-6% opacity so rules sit INTO the paper rather than on it.
hw:reasoning.hw:tradeoffs: Kept one stencil instead of a light split so measured column geometry cannot drift between substrates; substrate nuance lives entirely in material tokens, at the cost of any light-only structural flourish.
